Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

The current time is Friday, February 27th, 2026 at 21:30 in the Europe/Madrid time zone.

This is a recurring 30-minute heartbeat task for the HB Trading project. The purpose is to check on the health and status of the HB Trading system on a regular cadence.

Some key things to monitor and report on during this heartbeat:

- Check the system logs for any errors or anomalies
- Verify the trading bot is running and responding as expected
- Review recent trade activity and performance metrics
- Ensure all external integrations (data feeds, exchanges, etc.) are functioning properly
- Identify any issues that require further investigation or action

I will document the findings of this heartbeat in the project's daily log file: `/Users/FIRMAS/.openclaw/workspace/memory/2026-02-27.md`. Let me know if you need any additional information.
